data.body: OPERATIONAL work STARTED (parallel to d01e). AC change: removed the rollback-rehearsal AC (flag-revert rehearsal clause + the live-heal partial-failure rehearsal AC) per direction. Remaining operational ACs: (1) >=10 clean shadow passes, (2) capped live heal, (3) flip after both gates, (4) clean flag-ON live pass. Phase-1 STEP DONE: enabled reconciler.baseline_dual_write=true in rebar.toml -> Gerrit change 437 (in flight). Once 437 lands, the reconcile-bridge (~8-min cadence) emits 'RECON: baseline_shadow_check divergent=N' each run; I will accrue + document >=10 consecutive divergent=0 run-ids, then flip baseline_consumer_swap=true and verify a clean flag-ON pass. COORDINATION NOTE: the streak accrues on the PROD REB bridge — d01e's live matrix (which creates test issues in REB) must NOT run during the streak window or it pollutes the shadow passes and resets the streak. Hence d01e's live tail is sequenced AFTER the a118 streak; d01e's offline harness foundation already landed (change 436).
